capabilities.name: Valuable Component Extraction
capabilities.description: Identify genuinely useful components in a stub codebase (loaders, validators, graph engines, reference data) and separate them from throwaway stubs.
examples: Keep a working skill loader but discard empty health engine
Preserve validation engine and upgrade breaking-change data
Identify knowledge graph engine as reusable infrastructure

capabilities.name: Component Consolidation
capabilities.description: Merge redundant engines that share the same pattern and delete unnecessary components that add no value.
examples: Merge SimulationEngine and UpgradeSimulationEngine into one rule engine
Merge ReasoningEngine, Planner, and DecisionEngine into an LLM-based intelligence layer
Delete ExecutiveDashboard until real metrics exist

capabilities.name: Production Foundation Design
capabilities.description: Design the backend, database, cache, queue, API, auth, multi-tenancy, and audit infrastructure needed for production.
examples: Replace JSON file storage with PostgreSQL and Redis
Add OAuth2/RBAC and row-level tenant isolation
Build structured audit logs and API layer

capabilities.name: AI Layer Redesign
capabilities.description: Replace custom keyword/template engines with LLM-based reasoning, RAG, embeddings, and existing agent frameworks.
examples: Use LangGraph for agent orchestration
Replace keyword memory with vector database + embeddings
Add human-in-the-loop for destructive actions

capabilities.name: Digital Twin Redesign
capabilities.description: Replace dictionary-based twins with event-driven graph models that support delta history, conflict resolution, and staleness detection.
examples: Use Neo4j or pggraph for twin storage
Implement event-driven sync with connector health
Add snapshot diffing and rollback points

capabilities.name: Real Connector Design
capabilities.description: Design secure, least-privilege connectors for PostgreSQL, Odoo ORM, Git, Docker, and Kubernetes with audit and retry.
examples: Build read-only PostgreSQL connector with query timeout
Design Odoo XML-RPC connector with user impersonation
Secure Docker/Kubernetes connectors with service accounts

capabilities.name: Phased Rebuild Roadmap
capabilities.description: Produce a time-boxed, team-sized, milestone-driven plan to rebuild the platform from foundation to operations.
examples: Phase 1: Foundation (months 1-3)
Phase 2: Real Digital Twin (months 3-6)
Phase 3: AI Layer (months 6-9)

capabilities.name: Scope Reduction Strategy
capabilities.description: Identify the smallest valuable use case to ship first instead of rebuilding all layers at once.
examples: Ship Odoo module validation + upgrade impact reports first
Defer full Digital Twin until a single connector works end-to-end
Focus on one domain (e.g., CRM) before generalizing
